---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new strategy, adapter, or capability
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**What problem does this solve?**
A clear description of the problem or gap.

**Proposed solution**
Describe what you'd like to see added.

**Is this a new strategy?**
If yes, describe the signal logic at a high level (what market condition does it trade on?).

**Alternatives considered**
Any other approaches you've thought about.
